---
id: update-expense
title: "Update an expense"
description: "Update an existing expense. Only expenses in draft status can be updated."
sidebar_label: "Update an expense"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "patch api-method"
info_path: docs/api/fjord-expense-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Update an expense"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"patch"}
  path={"/expenses/{expense_id}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Update an existing expense. Only expenses in draft status can be updated.
